positive: A stylized, detailed illustration of a glowing crescent moon peeking over rolling, silhouetted hills under a deep indigo night sky. The moon emits soft, magical bioluminescent streaks that drift down towards stylized constellations of geometric stars. Scattered elements include minimalist hot air balloons shaped like gentle animals (elephants, giraffes) floating near the horizon line. Style should be elegant, highly contrasting, and reminiscent of celestial art meets modern folklore. The color palette is restricted to deep indigos, teal, soft gold, and vibrant cyan accents. Central composition, clean silhouettes, high contrast, vector print quality, suitable for fabric printing, rule of thirds applied to the horizon line, minimal details.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, low quality, jpeg artifacts, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped, poorly rendered, excess detail
